## What's Wrong

**Section/Line:** (e.g., Step 2, line 47)

**Description of the bug:**
<!-- Describe what is wrong: broken link, incorrect code, wrong reference, typo, etc. -->

## Correct Information

**What it should say/link to:**
<!-- If you know the correct content, please provide it -->

## Evidence

<!-- Link to sources, official documentation, or test results that support the correction -->

## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Incorrect security guidance that could cause missed vulnerabilities
- [ ] 🟠 High — Broken code sample or dangerously wrong procedure
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Factual error or broken link
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Typo, grammar, or formatting issue

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues reporting this bug
- [ ] This is a content error, not a feature request
